title: Nursery Rhyme. DLIII. Natural History.
content:
Pussy sits behind the fire,
            How can she be fair?
        In comes the little dog,
            Pussy, are you there?
        So, so, Mistress Pussy,
            Pray how do you do?
        Thank you, thank you, little dog,
            I'm very well just now.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DLIII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
